word: H7951 - שָׁלָה - shâlâh - shaw-law' - Be happy

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁלו שׁלה

Transliteration: shâlâh shâlav

Phonetic: shaw-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be at rest, prosper, be quiet, be at ease
    1. (Qal)
      1. to be or have quiet
      2. to be at ease, prosper

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2392

Part(s) of speech: Verb
